Sandbox_PZCrossbows_LootSpawnMult_toolti: Multiplies all PZ Crossbows container loot and foraging spawns, including crossbows, bolt quivers, bolts and bolt parts. This combines with each crossbow's individual multiplier.
Sandbox_PZCrossbows_CrudeCrossbowSpawnMu: Multiplies how often crude crossbows spawn in container loot and foraging.
Sandbox_PZCrossbows_ImprovedCrossbowSpaw: Multiplies how often improved crossbows spawn in container loot and foraging.
Sandbox_PZCrossbows_CompoundCrossbowSpaw: Multiplies how often compound crossbows and full-size bolts spawn in container loot and foraging.
Sandbox_PZCrossbows_HandCrossbowSpawnMul: Multiplies how often hand crossbows and short bolts spawn in container loot and foraging.
Sandbox_PZCrossbows_BoltWBaseBreakChance: Base chance that a lodged wood bolt is recovered intact instead of broken.
Sandbox_PZCrossbows_BoltWBreakChanceScal: Wood Bolt Recovery Bonus per Maintenance Level
Extra intact recovery chance added for each Maintenance level.
Sandbox_PZCrossbows_BoltSWBaseBreakChanc: Base chance that a lodged short wood bolt is recovered intact instead of broken.
Sandbox_PZCrossbows_BoltSWBreakChanceSca: Short Wood Bolt Recovery Bonus per Maintenance Level
Extra intact recovery chance added for each Maintenance level.
